message.content:
@startuml
title Request Order Change

actor Buyer
actor Grower
actor Manager
control System
database db

Buyer -> System : Make **Order Change Request**
System -> db : Insert **Order\nChange Request**
System -> Manager : Email **Order\nChange Request**

group Confirmation process
  Buyer <- Manager : Confirm details of **Order\nChange Request** over email
  Grower <- Manager : Confirm details of **Order\nChange Request** over email
  == [All agreed?] ==
  Manager -> System : Edit **Order**
  System -> db : Update **Order**
  System -> db : Update **Order\nChange Request**
  Grower <- System : Email details **Order Change**
  Buyer <- System : Email details **Order Change**
  == [Not agreed to?] ==
  note right of System
    Nothing to do here unless we add a
    **Change Request** editing function
  end note
end group

note bottom
1. _Email_ could also mean text message,
phone call or face to face
end note

@enduml
